title: Generator Configuration Create Request Schema
description: Request-only inner contract for dataset create/update. Mirrors fields the backend BenchmarkCreator reads; resource schema stays canonical for reads.

id.description: Optional generator configuration identifier accepted for resource-shaped compatibility.

dataset_id.description: Canonical reference to the evaluation dataset this generator is associated with.

eval_dataset_id.description: Legacy alias for the evaluation dataset identifier.

evaluation_set_id.description: Legacy alias for the evaluation dataset identifier.

benchmark_id.description: Compatibility alias for the evaluation dataset identifier.

model_parameters_id.description: Optional model parameters reference accepted for resource-shaped compatibility.

model_id.description: Identifier of the model the backend should use for generation.

parameters.description: Backend-read model parameter overrides for generation.

instructions.description: Detailed instructions guiding the example generation process.

context_type.description: Permissive context type hint accepted from legacy and canonical clients.

context_source.description: Permissive context source hint accepted from legacy and canonical clients.
